snippet: Schools can hold their cash in: All school bank accounts must be in the name of the school council. The name of the accounts should align with the school’s registered ABN name. All school bank accounts must be held with an approved panel bank under the State Purchasing Contract (SPC). The approved panel bank suppliers are: To ensure schools plan effectively, it is essential to prepare a cash flow budget to determine cash requirements in any given period, whilst maintaining the schools’ cash reserve benchmark. Schools must seek approval from the department by emailing schools.finance.support@education.vic.gov.au to maintain Beneficiary and/or Memorial funds in a separate account.
